zh.Norbury, Greater London, England, United: 英國英格蘭倫敦諾波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stavelegh於大約1308年出生在英國爾時，她的父親Robert de Stavelegh28歲，母親Margaret de Worsley26歲。她於1327年與Sir Robert de Hyde在英國爾諾波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1364年在英國英格蘭倫敦諾波利享年57歲。

zh-hans.Norbury, Greater London, England, United: 英国英格兰倫敦諾波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stavelegh于大约1308年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲Robert de Stavelegh28岁，母亲Margaret de Worsley26岁。她于1327年与Sir Robert de Hyde在英国爾諾波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1364年在英国英格兰倫敦諾波利享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stavelegh was born about 1308, in Cheshire, England, her father, Robert de Stavelegh, was 28 and her mother, Margaret de Worsley, was 26. She married Sir Robert de Hyde in 1327, in Norbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1364, in Norbury, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stavelegh est née environ 1308, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Stavelegh, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Worsley, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Hyde en 1327, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1364, à Norbury, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stavelegh um 1308 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Stavelegh 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Worsley 26. Sie hat 1327 in Norbury, Cheshire, England Sir Robert de Hyde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1364 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Norbury, London, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stavelegh è nata il circa 1308 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Stavelegh, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Worsley, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert de Hyde nel 1327, nel Norbury, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1364, nel Norbury, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Staveleghが約1308年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Staveleghは28歳，母Margaret de Worsleyは26歳であった。1327年にイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーでSir Robert de Hydeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1364年にイギリスイギリスロンドンノーブリーで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stavelegh(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Stavelegh(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Worsley(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1327년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 Sir Robert de Hyde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 노르버이에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stavelegh nasceu aproximadamente 1308, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Stavelegh, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Worsley, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Hyde em 1327, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1364, em Norbury, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stavelegh родилась около 1308 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Stavelegh было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Worsley, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Hyde в 1327 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1364 г. в местности норбури, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stavelegh nació aproximadamente 1308, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Stavelegh, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret de Worsley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Robert de Hyde en 1327, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1364, en Norbury, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
